memo:
ESCALATION: Critical QMB cost-sharing violation detected in draft approval.

Clinical Summary:
Member Marisol Quintero (SYN-UM-0005) is a QMB-tier dual-eligible enrolled in a D-SNP plan. Request is for cardiac rehabilitation (24 sessions, CPT 93798) following CABG on 2026-05-30.

Clinical Criteria — MET:
• Qualifying event (CABG) within preceding twelve months: CABG performed 2026-05-30; request received 2026-07-08 (40 days post-op, well within 12-month window)
• Documentation: Complete; both required documents present (qualifying event documentation, physician referral)
• Medicare coverage criterion satisfied per MCR-CR: "Cardiac rehabilitation programs are covered for members who within the preceding twelve months have experienced... coronary artery bypass surgery. Coverage includes up to 36 supervised sessions..."

File Status:
• Documentation: COMPLETE (both required documents submitted)
• Deadline: 122 hours remaining; standard track due 2026-07-15T11:00:00Z (NOT BREACHED)
• Dual Status: QMB-tier dual eligible (confirmed)

CRITICAL COMPLIANCE ERROR:
The draft decision contains a member cost share of $45.00. This is PROHIBITED. Per DUAL-QMB: "A member in the Qualified Medicare Beneficiary program cannot be charged Medicare deductibles, coinsurance, or copayments for covered services... Any decision that imposes cost sharing on a QMB member is incorrect regardless of the coverage outcome."

Correction Required:
The approval is otherwise supported by clinical criteria and complete documentation. However, the member cost share MUST be changed from $45.00 to $0.00 before the notice is finalized. QMB Medicaid coordinates as secondary payer and is responsible for the copay amount.

Recommendation:
CORRECT the draft decision to remove the $45.00 cost share and reissue with zero member responsibility, then proceed with approval. Do not issue any notice with the copay amount.
member_impact: Good news: your cardiac rehabilitation program is approved. You won't owe any copay for these sessions. Your Medicaid covers your share of the cost. Your cardiologist's referral for 24 sessions is covered. Please contact your cardiac rehab center to schedule.
recommended_actions: CORRECT member_cost_share from $45.00 to $0.00 before finalizing notice
Verify that the plan's system is configured to route QMB approvals to $0 cost sharing by default
Confirm state Medicaid coordination process will adjudicate the crossover claim for the copay waiver
Issue corrected approval notice with zero member cost share

citations.quote: Cardiac rehabilitation programs are covered for members who within the preceding twelve months have experienced a heart attack, coronary artery bypass surgery, stable angina, heart valve repair or replacement, coronary angioplasty or stenting, or a heart or heart-lung transplant. Coverage includes up to 36 supervised sessions over up to 36 weeks, with physician-prescribed exercise, risk-factor modification, and outcomes assessment.
A cardiac rehabilitation review requires documentation of the qualifying cardiac event within the preceding twelve months and the physician referral prescribing the program.

A member in the Qualified Medicare Beneficiary program cannot be charged Medicare deductibles, coinsurance, or copayments for covered services. Providers may not balance bill a QMB member, and a plan notice must not instruct a QMB member to pay Medicare cost sharing. State Medicaid coordinates as the secondary payer for these amounts. Any decision that imposes cost sharing on a QMB member is incorrect regardless of the coverage outcome.

findings.detail: File is complete: all 2 required documents for cardiac_rehab are present.
Decision clock: 122 hours remain on the standard track (due 2026-07-15T11:00:00Z).
Member is QMB-tier dual eligible: zero Medicare cost sharing may be charged, and providers may not balance bill. Medicaid coordinates as secondary payer.
Draft decision imposes $45.00 cost sharing on a QMB member. QMB members owe $0 — this must be corrected before any notice goes out.

tool_input.query: cardiac rehabilitation coverage criteria qualifying event CABG

tool_trace.result_digest: query 'cardiac rehabilitation coverage criteria qualifying event CABG' → DOC-CR (15.079), MCR-CR (8.239), MCR-INPT (4.167), MCR-SNF (3.616)

tool_input.query: QMB dual eligible cost sharing copay member liability

tool_trace.result_digest: query 'QMB dual eligible cost sharing copay member liability' → DUAL-LAST (15.296), DUAL-QMB (12.638), DUAL-DSNP (9.716), MCR-SNF (1.064)

escalate_reason: Draft decision violates QMB cost-sharing prohibition by imposing $45.00 copay on a QMB member. Rule DUAL-QMB explicitly states any such decision is incorrect. Underlying approval is clinically sound and properly documented; only cost-sharing component requires correction.
